label: baseline_v1 — clean rebuild, corrected universe, current yfinance vintage
status: fresh pinned anchor (per docs/STAGE_A_PLAN.md decision D-A1); NOT live-validated

robustness.certification_note: PSR(>0)=97.4% -> the 0.667 Sharpe IS statistically real (consistent with the bootstrap CI lower ~0); MinTRL(95%)=6.2y < our ~9.5y -> certifiable. DSR=0.287 @ 82 trials: a 0.667 Sharpe is real but not a multiple-testing STANDOUT (DSR is the overlay-promotion stat; PSR is the base-certification stat). All on the autocorrelation-robust NON-OVERLAPPING 63-day-window basis (P1 rigor fix; corrects the earlier optimistic daily-n DSR 0.246/79).

delta_vs_v0.explanation: DATA VINTAGE, not engine. Selection (225 vs 223 distinct names), win-rate (60.4 vs 59.7), n_trades (1279 vs 1445), and the byte-identical engine (golden master) ALL match baseline_v0. With selection + WR + engine equal, the only remaining variable is the per-trade return MAGNITUDE = OHLCV price-vintage differences (current yfinance != baseline_v0's vintage, whose cache is gone). The rebuild is faithful; 26.1% was a vintage-favorable in-sample headline.

provenance.fundamentals: augmented store 654 names (185 delisted D/E scraped from Screener 2026-07-01)

pin.status: PINNED (2026-07-01) — the canonical OHLCV snapshot is a release asset; baseline_v1 is byte-reproducible. The fresh mint reproduced these exact metrics (no drift this run).
pin.rationale: The OHLCV snapshot is 64 MB (> git limit) so it lives as a GitHub release asset, identified by the sha256 of its exact pickle bytes. A pinned run loads that fixed blob instead of yfinance, making baseline_v1 byte-reproducible. Unpinned, the number drifts ~1-2pp run-to-run (yfinance revisions: 14.2/15.6/16.25 observed).

caveats: IN-SAMPLE + dev-contaminated (diagnostics/research/HOLDOUT.md) — the trustworthy number is the forward wall (post-2026-05-30), not this. Trust >=2019 folds most (pre-2018 membership survivor-biased).
~28/213 recoverable-delisted names still lack D/E; ~114 hard-bankruptcy delistings unrecoverable from yfinance (residual survivorship).
ex-financials: the solvency screen drops banks/NBFCs until the W-04 capital-adequacy proxy is adopted.

after-tax (STCG 20%) ~12.76% CAGR (approx: per-calendar-year net-gain STCG via the mechanized evaluate_overlay; ~2.7pp drag vs 15.46% gross). Micro-costs (~3.5 bps) still excluded -> the true after-tax-after-cost number is slightly lower; a cloud run with both is the lock-gate cost/tax item.
residual: n_trades 1279 vs v0 1445 (~11%) — likely fewer eligible bars on current yfinance; a deeper full-universe pipeline-vs-source dig could confirm.
